Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze the provided PostgreSQL database schema and event log data to identify anomalies hypothesize about their causes and propose SQL queries to investigate these hypotheses

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normal Process Flow 1 Register Order Sales 2 Perform Credit Check Finance 3 Validate Stock Warehouse 4 Confirm Shipment Logistics 5 Ship Goods Logistics 6 Issue Invoice Finance 7 Receive Payment Finance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 This follows the normal flow perfectly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Anomaly out of order before credit check and stock validation Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods happen before Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Hypothesis The order is a priority order as seen in the orders table Priority orders might be fast tracked shipping before credit or stock checks which is risky Or it could be a process violation system bypass

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Validate Stock is completely missing Ship Goods happens before Confirm Shipment Confirm Shipment is late Issue Invoice happens before Confirm Shipment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Hypothesis Rushed processing leading to skipped steps Validate Stock missing System lag or manual delay in confirming shipment Shipping without confirming or validating stock could cause inventory discrepancies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Receive Payment before Invoice before Credit Check before Stock validation before Shipment Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock are missing Shipment scheduled N yet goods are shipped

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypothesis Pre payment or upfront payment by customer However receiving payment before issuing an invoice is a compliance issue Also shipping goods when shipment scheduled N indicates a severe process violation or system override

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: General Anomalies Identified Out of order execution Skipped activities Data inconsistencies Fast tracked high value or priority orders

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses to Investigate Priority or High Value Orders Bypass Controls Upfront Payments Cause Process Deviations Late or Shipped before Confirmed Orders Lead to Data Corrections Resource Workarounds

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Proposed SQL Queries Find orders where Ship Goods occurred before Validate Stock or Perform Credit Check Find orders where Receive Payment occurred before Issue Invoice Identify cases with skipped activities Analyze if priority orders have more deviations than standard orders Check for cases where shipment was scheduled as N but goods were shipped Find resources involved in the most out of sequence activities
